name: video-template-cinematic-emotional-face-close-up
title: Cinematic Emotional Face Close-up

title_i18n.ja: 映画的な感情表現の顔のクローズアップ
title_i18n.fr: Gros plan émotionnel cinématographique du visage
title_i18n.it: Primo piano emotivo cinematografico del viso
title_i18n.vi: Cận cảnh khuôn mặt cảm xúc điện ảnh

description: A highly detailed technical prompt for Seedance 2.0 focusing on realistic skin textures and a series of complex emotional facial transitions.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 为 Seedance 2.0 提供高度细致的技术提示，专注于逼真的皮肤纹理和复杂的面部情绪转换系列。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 為 Seedance 2.0 提供高度細緻的技術提示，專注於逼真的皮膚紋理和複雜的面部情緒轉換系列。
description_i18n.ja: Seedance 2.0向けの高精細な技術プロンプトで、リアルな肌質感と複雑な表情の変化シリーズに焦点を当てています。
description_i18n.ko: Seedance 2.0을 위한 고도로 상세한 기술 프롬프트로, 사실적인 피부 질감과 복잡한 얼굴 감정 전환 시리즈에 중점을 둡니다.
description_i18n.de: Ein hochdetaillierter technischer Prompt für Seedance 2.0, der sich auf realistische Hauttexturen und eine Reihe komplexer emotionaler Gesichtsübergänge konzentriert.
description_i18n.fr: Un prompt technique très détaillé pour Seedance 2.0 axé sur des textures de peau réalistes et une série de transitions faciales émotionnelles complexes.
description_i18n.ru: Высокодетализированный технический промпт для Seedance 2.0, фокусирующийся на реалистичных текстурах кожи и серии сложных эмоциональных переходов на лице.
description_i18n.es: Un prompt técnico altamente detallado para Seedance 2.0 centrado en texturas de piel realistas y una serie de transiciones faciales emocionales complejas.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Um prompt técnico altamente detalhado para Seedance 2.0 focado em texturas de pele realistas e uma série de transições faciais emocionais complexas.
description_i18n.it: Un prompt tecnico altamente dettagliato per Seedance 2.0 focalizzato su texture della pelle realistiche e una serie di transizioni facciali emotive complesse.
description_i18n.vi: Một prompt kỹ thuật chi tiết cao cho Seedance 2.0 tập trung vào kết cấu da chân thực và chuỗi chuyển đổi cảm xúc trên khuôn mặt phức tạp.
description_i18n.pl: Wysoce szczegółowy prompt techniczny dla Seedance 2.0 skupiający się na realistycznych teksturach skóry i serii złożonych przejść emocjonalnych na twarzy.
description_i18n.id: Prompt teknis yang sangat detail untuk Seedance 2.0 yang berfokus pada tekstur kulit realistis dan serangkaian transisi emosi wajah yang kompleks.
description_i18n.nl: Een zeer gedetailleerde technische prompt voor Seedance 2.0 gericht op realistische huidtexturen en een reeks complexe emotionele gezichtstransities.
description_i18n.ar: موجه تقني مفصل للغاية لـ Seedance 2.0 يركز على نسيج البشرة الواقعي وسلسلة من تحولات تعابير الوجه العاطفية المعقدة.
description_i18n.tr: Seedance 2.0 için gerçekçi cilt dokuları ve karmaşık duygusal yüz geçişleri serisine odaklanan son derece detaylı teknik prompt.
description_i18n.uk: Високодеталізований технічний промпт для Seedance 2.0, зосереджений на реалістичних текстурах шкіри та серії складних емоційних переходів на обличчі.
description_i18n.en: A highly detailed technical prompt for Seedance 2.0 focusing on realistic skin textures and a series of complex emotional facial transitions.

query.en: A realistic human face with highly detailed skin texture, pores, and micro-musculature. Scene: Tight portrait close-up against a dark, void-like background. Style: Cinematic realism, 35mm film aesthetic, shallow depth of field with soft bokeh, moody and introspective. Lighting: Dynamic emotional lighting that shifts in color temperature and direction to match the internal state. Audio: Ambient atmospheric drone, soft rhythmic breathing, subtle emotional orchestral swells. Avoid: Identity drift, jitter, distorted limbs, unnatural morphing artifacts. [0-3s] Camera: Slow, imperceptible push-in. Action: The face breaks into a genuine, soft smile; eyes crinkle at the corners and the cheeks lift. Lighting: Warm golden-hour glow, soft and frontal. Vfx: Subtle lens flare. [3-6s] Camera: Static extreme close-up. Action: The smile dissolves into a heavy, downward curve; eyes well up with glistening tears that catch the light, and the lower lip trembles. Lighting: Transition to a cool, melancholy blue wash from above. [6-9s] Camera: Controlled lateral pan. Action: The brow furrows deeply into a sharp V-shape; the jaw clenches visibly, and nostrils flare with rhythmic, heavy breathing. Lighting: Harsh, high-contrast red and orange side-lighting creating deep shadows. [9-12s] Camera: Subtle handheld micro-shake for tension. Action: The eyes snap wide, pupils dilating; the face pales as the muscles go taut, and the mouth hangs slightly open in a shallow gasp. Lighting: Dim, desaturated, flickering low-key light. [12-15s] Camera: Gentle pull-out to a medium close-up. Action: All tension drains from the face; the eyes slowly close, and the features settle into a mask of perfect, serene stillness. Lighting: Soft, diffused white light enveloping the subject like a halo.
